name: Check live node health
output:
$ python3 -c 'import json,urllib.request; print(json.dumps(json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('"'"'https://rustchain.org/health'"'"', timeout=15)), indent=2))'
{
  "backup_age_hours": 12.388352983196576,
  "db_rw": true,
  "ok": true,
  "tip_age_slots": 0,
  "uptime_s": 94265,
  "version": "2.2.1-rip200"
}

name: Inspect wallet CLI commands
output:
$ uv run --with requests --with cryptography --with mnemonic python tools/rustchain_wallet_cli.py --help
usage: rustchain-wallet [-h]
                        {create,import,export,balance,send,history,miners,epoch}
                        ...

RustChain Wallet CLI

positional arguments:
  {create,import,export,balance,send,history,miners,epoch}
    create              Generate new wallet (24-word mnemonic + encrypted
                        keystore)
    import              Import wallet from 24-word mnemonic
    export              Export encrypted keystore JSON
    balance             Check wallet balance
    send                Send signed transfer
    history             Wallet transaction history
    miners              List active miners
    epoch               Show current epoch

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

name: Read current epoch
output:
$ uv run --with requests --with cryptography --with mnemonic python tools/rustchain_wallet_cli.py epoch
{
  "blocks_per_epoch": 144,
  "enrolled_miners": 24,
  "epoch": 179,
  "epoch_pot": 1.5,
  "slot": 25891,
  "total_supply_rtc": 8388608
}

name: Summarize active miners
cmd: PYTHONWARNINGS='ignore:Unverified HTTPS request' uv run --with requests --with cryptography --with mnemonic python tools/rustchain_wallet_cli.py miners | python3 -c 'import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); miners=data.get("miners", data if isinstance(data,list) else data.get("items", [])); print("active_miners", len(miners)); print(json.dumps(miners[:3], indent=2))'
output:
$ bash -lc 'PYTHONWARNINGS='"'"'ignore:Unverified HTTPS request'"'"' uv run --with requests --with cryptography --with mnemonic python tools/rustchain_wallet_cli.py miners | python3 -c '"'"'import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); miners=data.get("miners", data if isinstance(data,list) else data.get("items", [])); print("active_miners", len(miners)); print(json.dumps(miners[:3], indent=2))'"'"''
